name: Icejade Erosion
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>氷</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ヒ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>水</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>スイ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>浸</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>シン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>蝕</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ショク</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: You can target 1 face-up card your opponent controls; destroy 1 "Icejade" monster you control, and if you do, negate the targeted card's effects until the end of this turn. If a face-up WATER monster you control leaves the field by an opponent's card, except by being destroyed (and except during the Damage Step): You can add to your hand or Special Summon, 1 "Icejade" monster from your Deck. You can only use each effect of "Icejade Erosion" once per turn.
eff: You can target 1 face-up card your opponent controls; destroy 1 "Icejade" monster you control, and if you do, negate the targeted card's effects until the end of this turn. If a face-up WATER monster you control leaves the field by an opponent's card, except by being destroyed (and except during the Damage Step): You can add to your hand or Special Summon, 1 "Icejade" monster from your Deck. You can only use each effect of "Icejade Erosion" once per turn.

sets.set: 25th Anniversary Tin: Dueling Heroes Mega Pack

action: Activates if other cards leave the field
mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
Negates the effects of your opponent's Spell Cards
Negates the effects of your opponent's Trap Cards
